category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a distributed, offline-first bug tracker embedded in Git; official README calls it a decentralized issue tracker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-bug; official repository title is git-bug/git-bug.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the repository doc directory as Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/git-bug/git-bug, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says distributed offline-first bug tracker; official GitHub topics include git, bugtracker, and distributed-systems.
